name: arifOS MCP
description: Constitutional MCP gateway — arifOS AAA. 13 canonical tools (arif_<noun>_<verb>), 13 floors, human veto. DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI.

tools.name: arif_session_init
tools.description: Initialize constitutional session with identity anchor and telemetry seed.

tools.name: arif_sense_observe
tools.description: Ground query in physical reality via 8-stage constitutional sensing protocol.

tools.name: arif_evidence_fetch
tools.description: Fetch and verify external evidence under F2 truth threshold.

tools.name: arif_mind_reason
tools.description: Multi-source synthesis and structured first-principles reasoning with uncertainty bands.

tools.name: arif_heart_critique
tools.description: Red-team proposal for ethical risks. Evaluate against F5, F6, F9.

tools.name: arif_kernel_route
tools.description: Route request to correct metabolic lane or tool family based on risk and task type.

tools.name: arif_reply_compose
tools.description: Compose dual-axis reply: technical answer + constitutional commentary.

tools.name: arif_memory_recall
tools.description: Retrieve governed memory and engineering context from vector store.

tools.name: arif_gateway_connect
tools.description: A2A federation routing — connect to peer agents via Agent Card protocol.

tools.name: arif_judge_deliberate
tools.description: Final constitutional verdict evaluation. Outputs: SEAL, PARTIAL, VOID, HOLD.

tools.name: arif_vault_seal
tools.description: Append immutable verdict record to Merkle-hashed VAULT999 ledger.

tools.name: arif_forge_execute
tools.description: Issue signed execution manifest to A-FORGE substrate. Requires SEAL.

tools.name: arif_ops_measure
tools.description: Calculate operational costs, thermodynamics, capacity, and timing with entropy analysis.
